name: Reference Image - Gym Selfie
description: Face/identity preservation using uploaded reference image

reference.face_accuracy: 100% identical to reference — same facial structure, proportions, skin texture, expression, and details

hair.style: long wavy hair with a half-up messy bun, loose strands framing the face

pose.stance: standing with one leg slightly forward

hands.right: holding a purple smartphone for a mirror selfie
hands.left: holding a transparent water bottle with blue liquid

top.layer: white long-sleeve shirt tied around the waist

environment.reflection: mirror seam visible vertically in frame

lighting.quality: even, neutral illumination with minimal shadows

image_style.detail: sharp clothing textures and clear gym background

lighting.type: soft natural daylight from side window

reference.face_accuracy: 100% identical to reference — preserve all facial features exactly

wardrobe.top: navy blue blazer over white blouse

lighting.quality: soft key light with fill, subtle rim light for separation

image_style.detail: sharp focus on face, smooth background

model_specific_flags.flux_ip_adapter: Use with IP-Adapter for best face preservation

common_mistakes: Not specifying skin tone match leads to inconsistent skin
Vague face_accuracy results in approximate likeness

grok-imagine.prompt: Full-body gym mirror selfie, young woman with dark brown wavy hair in half-up messy bun, white fitted t-shirt with white long-sleeve tied around waist, navy blue high-waisted athletic leggings, white sneakers, holding purple phone and blue water bottle, modern gym with treadmills and mirrors

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman takes a full-body mirror selfie in a modern indoor gym. Her face is 100% identical to the uploaded reference image with the same facial structure, proportions, skin texture, expression, and details. She has dark brown long wavy hair styled in a half-up messy bun with loose strands framing her face. She wears a fitted short-sleeve white t-shirt with a white long-sleeve shirt tied around her waist, high-waisted navy blue athletic leggings, white athletic sneakers with white crew socks. She stands with one leg slightly forward, right hand holding a purple smartphone for the selfie, left hand holding a transparent water bottle with blue liquid. Her expression is calm, composed, and slightly focused, eyes looking at the phone screen. The gym features large wall mirrors with a visible vertical seam, treadmills, weight machines, rubber gym flooring, and exercise mats. Bright overhead fluorescent lighting provides even neutral illumination with minimal shadows. Highly photorealistic with sharp clothing textures and clear gym background. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman taking full-body gym mirror selfie, face identical to reference image, dark brown wavy hair half-up messy bun loose strands, white fitted t-shirt white long-sleeve tied at waist, navy blue high-waisted athletic leggings, white sneakers white socks, holding purple smartphone and blue water bottle, modern gym large mirrors treadmills weight machines rubber flooring, bright overhead fluorescent lighting, photorealistic casual fitness style, not cartoon-like, not airbrushed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman takes a full-body mirror selfie in a modern indoor gym. Her face matches the uploaded reference image exactly with identical facial structure and features. She has dark brown long wavy hair in a half-up messy bun with loose strands. She wears a fitted white t-shirt with a white long-sleeve tied at her waist, navy blue high-waisted athletic leggings, white sneakers and socks. She holds a purple smartphone in her right hand and a blue water bottle in her left. Large gym mirrors show a vertical seam. Treadmills and weight machines in background. Bright fluorescent overhead lighting with even illumination.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the leggings color from navy blue to black while keeping the woman's face, pose, and all other clothing the same. Preserve the gym setting, mirror reflection, and lighting.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit
